\"MADELIS: This is the personal diary of: "MADELIS: This is the personal diary of Ms. Madelis of Team Xen.

Today is my first day at being an execut: Today is my first day at being an executive of this PRISTINE laboratory.

It's better than being placed as a lowly: It's better than being placed as a lowly grunt.

We all took what was nothing more than s: We all took what was nothing more than simple IQ tests, aptitude tests on our knowledge about Pokémon and all of the above.
I, of course, scored an IQ of 136.
It is a shocker, though.\\nI think it co: It is a shocker, though.\nI think it could be higher, but I digress.
I have new fellow executives, too! A you: I have new fellow executives, too! A young... kid named Gregory.
This other techy girl named Anastasia.
And an old friend from my old occupation: And an old friend from my old occupation, Cassandra.
Despite the kid, I think we make a good: Despite the kid, I think we make a good team!
We decided to give ourselves aliases as: We decided to give ourselves aliases as a way to separate ourselves from the lowly grunts, mhmhm...
My, lovely name, is a combination of my: My, lovely name, is a combination of my sister Lisbeth and my old name, Madeline.
I hope it will be a reminder that I'm do: I hope it will be a reminder that I'm doing all this for her in the first place.
Madame X sectioned me off the day before: Madame X sectioned me off the day before and told me that her "Hearth" system picked up Lisbeth's soul.
But that she would remain inside the mac: But that she would remain inside the machine until our mission is complete.
First of all, Madame X should <i>burn</i: First of all, Madame X should burn for ever thinking she could take advantage of me.
How dare she use my sister as a way of l: How dare she use my sister as a way of leverage?
Was the chance at a new life not enough?: Was the chance at a new life not enough? It was for me! Don't have to be underhanded!
But I'll get her back...\\nShe doesn't d: But I'll get her back...\nShe doesn't deserve what happened to her.
Okay! Promotions were made today and I d: Okay! Promotions were made today and I didn't get promoted!
Cassandra was pushed off to somewhere wh: Cassandra was pushed off to somewhere who the hell knows where.
Me and the kid were left behind with Cap: Me and the kid were left behind with Captain Newbie.
This old man who reeks of liquor and bri: This old man who reeks of liquor and brine.
Not actually, I just want to make fun of: Not actually, I just want to make fun of him.

It's all about what I deserve!\": It's all about what I deserve!"

Nastasia, if you hack into my journal, I: Nastasia, if you hack into my journal, I said what I SAID.

This will be my last entry because I am: This will be my last entry because I am LEARNING that there are some people who admire me so much they snoop.

I'm going to go on a video call with our: I'm going to go on a video call with our beloved little Professor, and Zetta will go to the forest for pickup.
